speaker: charlie
text: Well there you have it, not a bad way to kick off May really. Scientists cracking cancer detection, the planet getting some wins, and sport delivering the goods as usual.

speaker: alice
text: Honestly, days like this remind you why we do this show. There's always good stuff happening if you know where to look for it, and today we found it in spades.

speaker: charlie
text: Too right Jamie. Get out there and enjoy this cracking weather Sam's served up for us, maybe catch some of those Game 7s tonight.

speaker: alice
text: We'll be back tomorrow with more of the good stuff. Keep looking for the bright side, Queensland.

speaker: charlie
text: Catch you later, and remember - there's always something worth celebrating if you're paying attention. This has been ParkSyde Bright Side.
